messages.text: The rot-blossom flexes wide and coughs a cloud of grey spore full into your face, and it burns going in and keeps burning. The blow {verb} you!
The rot-blossom heaves and looses its spore-cloud, and you throw an arm across your face and stumble clear of the worst of it.
The rot-blossom bursts and drowns you in a churning fog of spore that fills your lungs and your eyes and every open wound! The blow {verb} you!
